channel.title: The Political Lens - Shorts
channel.description: Daily AI-powered political analysis shorts for TikTok and Instagram

item.title: Trump's Iran War: How the Nuclear Deal Collapse Led to Conflict
item.description:
Did Trump's decision to withdraw from the Iran nuclear deal spark a direct military conflict? This analysis breaks down the strategic decisions and diplomatic breakdown that changed everything.
In today's analysis: • Why Trump withdrew from the 2015 Iran nuclear deal and called it a "disaster" • How reimposed sanctions escalated tensions between the US and Iran • The military strikes and retaliatory actions that followed the breakdown • What experts say about the long-term consequences of abandoning diplomacy
0:00 Intro 0:15 The Iran Nuclear Deal Explained 1:45 Trump's Decision to Withdraw 3:20 Sanctions and Escalation 5:10 Military Conflict Breakdown 6:45 Analysis and Consequences
If you found this analysis valuable, hit SUBSCRIBE and turn on the bell notification so you never miss our deep dives into political strategy and global affairs.
This video uses AI-assisted voiceover and script writing. All topics and editorial direction are selected by The Political Lens team.
#PoliticsExplained #IranWar #TrumpForeignPolicy
